    Method
    Description
    static SimpleName
    StaticJavaParser.parseSimpleName​(String name)
    Parses a simple name (one that can NOT have "."s in it) and returns it as a SimpleName.

    Method
    Description
    ParseResult<SimpleName>
    JavaParser.parseSimpleName​(String name)
    Parses a simple name (one that can NOT have "."s in it) and returns it as a SimpleName.
